evals.prompt: Review this snippet: const q = `SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = '${email}'`;

expected_output.description: Flags SQL injection with sec prefix and safe fix direction.
assertions: Output suggests parameterized query or bound parameters
Output uses one-line comment format with location/problem/fix

evals.prompt: Review this diff: adds retry branch on 429 but no tests changed.

expected_output.description: Flags missing test coverage for new branch behavior.
assertions: Output proposes concrete test to add

expected_output.description: Requests concrete review artifact before giving findings.
assertions: Output asks for diff, PR text, or code chunk
Output does not fabricate findings without input
